name: io.github.Abhishekkumar2021/notes
title: Notes
description: Local markdown notes: ranked + semantic search, tags, todos, a wiki-link knowledge graph, daily notes, templates, and slash-command workflows.

environmentVariables.name: NOTES_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory containing your markdown notes (defaults to ~/notes).

environmentVariables.name: NOTES_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 or true to disable all note-modifying tools.

environmentVariables.name: NOTES_MODEL_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Where the semantic-search embedding model is cached.
